sections.heading: Why Choose OpenClaw Agents

items.title: Instant & Secure Deployment
items.description: Launch AI agents in sandboxed containers in seconds. Enterprise-grade security without the complexity. Your data stays safe. Your workflows stay protected.

items.title: Real Business Results
items.description: Automate the work that eats your time. Save hours every week. Cut costs immediately. Your team focuses on what matters — building client relationships, not doing busywork.

items.title: No AI Expertise Needed
items.description: Simple setup for traditional businesses. You don't need to understand AI. Just describe what you want automated. We handle the rest.

sections.heading: Trusted by Professional Firms

sections.heading: Join 500+ Firms Already Automating
sections.description: Risk-free for 30 days. Proven to save 15+ hours per week. Deploy your first AI agent today — no contracts, no setup fees.

sections.heading: Common Questions
sections.subheading: Get answers about implementation, security, and ROI.

items.question: How much time will I actually save?
items.answer: On average, firms save 15-25 hours per week automating document review, client intake, and scheduling. Your mileage varies based on workflow complexity. We'll assess your specific workflows during onboarding.

items.question: What happens if the AI makes a mistake?
items.answer: Our agents are designed for high-stakes work. They include built-in validation, double-checking, and human review steps. You maintain full control and oversight. Mistakes are caught before they impact clients.

items.question: How long until I see ROI?
items.answer: Most firms break even in 3-4 weeks. Since we save you 15+ hours weekly at an average of \$150/hour, the monthly ROI is typically \$2,400+ — far exceeding the platform cost.

items.question: Do I need to integrate with my current tools?
items.answer: We integrate with Salesforce, HubSpot, QuickBooks, Gmail, Slack, and 100+ other tools. If your firm uses it, we likely connect to it. Full integration happens in your onboarding call.

items.question: What if we want to pause or cancel?
items.answer: No contracts. No cancellation fees. Pause or cancel anytime. Your workflows stay saved, so you can resume whenever you're ready. We want your success to speak for itself.
